conservative.name: Great Fires of U'Zhul
conservative.requirements: 7 power, not engaged with target, target within close range. Add K to your dice pool for each enemy in the target's engagement after the first

success.description: A great fiery ball flies from your hand, hitting your target for 5+ Intelligence damage

boon.description: The fireball explodes, causing 2+ Intelligence damage for each other enemy in the target's engagement

chaosStar.description: You hit each other character in the engagement, friend or foe, for 2+ Intelligence damage

reckless.name: Great Fires of U'Zhul
reckless.requirements: 7 power, not engaged with target, target within close range. Add K to your dice pool for each enemy in the target's engagement after the first

success.description: A great fiery ball flies from your hand, hitting your target for 4+ Intelligence damage

boon.description: The fireball explodes, causing 2+ Intelligence damage for each other enemy in the target's engagement

chaosStar.description: You hit each other character in the engagement, friend or foe, for 2+ Intelligence damage
